title: Documentation Structure And Development Docs Tasks
principles: Keep root AGENTS.md as a short routing atlas.
Add canonical docs only when they have a clear owner.
Do not link to aspirational files from the root atlas.
Keep public WhatTax docs focused on the open-source engine.

globalVerification.commitPolicy: Commit only after the documentation slice and verification pass.
requiredBeforeFinalPR: Audit .agents, AGENTS.md, architecture docs, package READMEs and root README for unintended Mobius-specific routing
evidenceRequired: Audit of root atlas links against existing files

tasks.title: Import and adapt PRD skills
tasks.goal: Make the local repo capable of writing and implementing specs with the canonical docs flow.
mandatoryVerification: Skill docs do not route to Mobius-specific architecture files
completionCriteria: Skill start-here docs exist in this repo

tasks.title: Create canonical docs buckets and metadata
tasks.goal: Create a stable documentation structure that future specs and agents can route through.
mandatoryVerification: All root atlas links point at existing files
Canonical docs include status, last_reviewed, source_of_truth and confidence
completionCriteria: Architecture index routes to focused docs

tasks.title: Normalize app and package README coverage
tasks.goal: Give current and planned package roots compact local docs before implementation begins.
outputs: README coverage for requested app and package roots
mandatoryVerification: Each README includes scope, main areas, runtime shape, guardrails and related docs
completionCriteria: Requested README files exist and match the compact pattern

tasks.title: Add documentation audit and final verification
tasks.goal: Record the current documentation baseline and verify the repo remains healthy.
mandatoryVerification: Audit root atlas for missing links
completionCriteria: Audit records inventory, README coverage, missing/stale docs and migration priorities
